case_title: REDDY, KRISHNA DBA KK COPYING & PRINTING VS PAULL, RORY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY REDDY, KRISHNA DBA KK COPYING & PRINTING AS TO DEFENDANT PAULL, RORY AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY YORK HOTEL GROUP DBA EMPIRE PLUSH ROOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAULL, RORY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. ($10 FEE SUBMITTED)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDDY, KRISHNA DBA KK COPYING & PRINTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAULL, RORY YORK HOTEL GROUP DBA EMPIRE PLUSH ROOM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT, RORY PAULL FILED.

EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED ON MARCH 28, 2008.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YORK HOTEL GROUP DBA EMPIRE PLUSH ROOM
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PAULL, RORY AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY YORK HOTEL GROUP DBA EMPIRE PLUSH ROOM HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF KRISHNA REEDY IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-16-2006, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDDY, KRISHNA DBA KK COPYING & PRINTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAULL, RORY AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY YORK HOTEL GROUP DBA EMPIRE PLUSH ROOM $3,214.65 PRINCIPAL, $107.16 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,396.81, THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION VACATES THE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT YORK HOTEL GROUP DBA EMPIRE PLUSH ROOM, & DISMISSES THIS DEFT WITH PREJUDICE. TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFT PAULL HAS TENDERED PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT USING AMERICAN EXPRESS & TO THE EXTENT THAT COVERS PENDING PAYMENT HAS BEEN MADE TO PLFT BY AMERICAN EXPRESS, SUCH PAYMET SHALL BE CREDITED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PAULL, RORY
